items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Policy paper: UK-Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) trade deal: conclusion summary
items.summary: The conclusion summary explains the provisions and chapters in the UK-Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) trade deal.

items.title: Employment tribunal: penalty enforcement and naming scheme
items.summary: Ask the Fair Work Agency  to take action if the respondent has not paid your employment tribunal award or Acas settlement.

items.title: Notice: Green Heat Network Fund (GHNF): guidance on how to apply
items.summary: Capital grant support is available for the development of new and existing low-carbon heat networks. This page contains guidance and details of how to apply via Triple Point.

items.title: Notice: Green Heat Network Fund: privacy notice
items.summary: How we will use your personal data when you apply to the Green Heat Network Fund.

items.title: Parminder Kohli appointed Chief Executive Officer of OFI
items.summary: The Business Secretary Peter Kyle has announced the appointment of Parminder Kohli as new Chief Executive Officer of the Office for Investment.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED) report: summary of analysis 2026
items.summary: Summary of analysis using the National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework using consumption data from 2005 to 2024.

items.title: Policy paper: Scale-Up Adviser: terms of reference
items.summary: This document sets out the terms of reference for the role of Scale-Up Adviser.

items.title: Policy paper: Advanced Nuclear Technologies
items.summary: Information about Advanced Nuclear Technologies, previously known as Small Modular Reactors.

items.title: Research: Potential economic impact of future Smart Data use cases
items.summary: Quantitative research assessing the potential social net present value and GDP impacts of 5 Smart Data use cases over a 15-year period.

items.title: Notice: Red Diesel Replacement competition: successful projects
items.summary: Grant funding for projects to develop and demonstrate innovative low carbon technologies for use as alternatives to red diesel on construction, mining and quarrying sites.

items.title: UK and allies sanction networks enabling settler violence in the West Bank
items.summary: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper announces co-ordinated sanctions with international partners targeting individuals and entities involved in financing and enabling settler violence in the occupied West Bank.

items.title: Policy paper: Industrial Strategy
items.summary: Strategy document setting out a new economic approach to backing the UK’s strengths, with ambitious plans for 8 high-growth sectors.

items.title: Research: CCUS Innovation 2.0 competition: UK BECCS-MCFC - Next generation CCUS technology for net zero 2050
items.summary: Key documents from the University of Sheffield’s Carbon Capture, Usage and Storage (CCUS) Innovation 2.0 project.

items.title: Notice: Boiler Upgrade Scheme Regulations: approved standards, grant categories and grant levels
items.summary: Lists of standards, grant categories and grant levels that have been approved for the scheme.

items.title: Guidance: Overseas business risk for Israel
items.summary: The overseas business risk report provides information on security and political risks which UK businesses may face when operating in Israel.

items.title: Guidance: Overseas business risk for Palestine
items.summary: The overseas business risk report provides information on key security and political risks which UK businesses may face when operating in Palestine.

items.title: Notice: Trade remedies notice: registration of imports of hot-rolled steel plates originating from South Korea
items.summary: Trade remedies notice published by the Secretary of State for Business and Trade relating to the registration of imports of hot-rolled steel plates originating from South Korea.

items.title: Guidance: Small business regulatory taskforce
items.summary: The small business taskforce is a joint government‑industry group to develop practical recommendations to reduce regulatory burdens on small and medium‑sized enterprises (SMEs) and micro-businesses.

items.title: Notice: Preference Tier Graduation: Vanuatu
items.summary: This notice sets out the preference tier graduation of Vanuatu in the UK’s Developing Countries Trading Scheme (DCTS).

items.title: New concierge service and visa scheme unveiled to help Britain’s fastest-growing firms scale and attract talent
items.summary: Concierge service for business launched as part of mission to bring about the UK's first trillion-dollar firm.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Make Work Pay: employment rights for unpaid carers and parents of seriously ill children
items.summary: We are seeking views on the employment rights that are available to people with unpaid caring responsibilities and parents who have a seriously ill child.

items.title: Official Statistics: Market access barrier statistics 2025 to 2026
items.summary: Headline figures on market access barriers reported and resolved for the financial year 2025 to 2026.

items.title: Official Statistics: Market access barrier quarterly statistics: January to March 2026
items.summary: This release covers statistics and analysis related to the Department for Business and Trade’s (DBT) activities to record and address market access barriers. It contains information on the number of market access barriers resolved in full and in part, with breakdowns by His Majesty’s Trade Commissioner (HMTC) region and trading partner. DBT defines barriers as the presence or absence of any legal, regulatory or administrative practice by another government or regulator that can impede a business exporting or investing overseas.

items.title: Unpaid carers and parents of seriously ill children could get new rights under Government proposals
items.summary: Government consults on new rights for unpaid carers and parents of seriously ill children, including whether paid leave could improve job opportunities.

items.title: Standard Assessment Procedure
items.summary: Overview of how a home's energy performance is calculated using the Standard Assessment Procedure (SAP).

items.title: Oil and gas: offshore environmental legislation
items.summary: Environmental regulations and guidance on offshore oil and gas exploration and production offshore gas unloading and storage and offshore carbon dioxide storage activities

items.title: Durham Business Growth
items.summary: Durham Business Growth is a comprehensive Programme designed to elevate productivity and foster growth within businesses located in County Durham.

items.title: Policy paper: UK Special Representative for Climate: terms of reference
items.summary: This document sets out the terms of reference for the role of UK Special Representative for Climate.

items.title: Draft National Policy Statement for fusion energy generation (EN-8)
items.summary: We are seeking views on a new National Policy Statement that supports decisions for fusion energy infrastructure.

items.title: Guidance: UK-China Intellectual Property newsletter
items.summary: At the end of every month we publish a newsletter covering recent intellectual property (IP) developments in China.

items.title: Research: Exploring Smart Data opportunities in the transport sector
items.summary: Qualitative research results on transport Smart Data use cases in England.

items.title: Companies agree to stronger workers’ rights in clean energy
items.summary: Offshore wind supply chain companies and trade unions back the government’s Offshore Wind Fair Work Charter.

items.summary: Comparisons of road fuel prices against other EU countries, using data from the European Commission Oil Bulletin.

items.summary: Reports on departmental staff numbers and costs.

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 8: Clean Industry Bonus framework and guidance
items.summary: The CfD Clean Industry Bonus will allow fixed and floating offshore wind applicants to get extra CfD revenue support if they choose to invest in more sustainable supply chains.

items.title: Decision: West Import Resilience Project: Environmental determination
items.summary: Environmental determination on a new 9km section of gas pipeline between Wormington and Honeybourne and a new 2km section of gas pipeline in Churchover.

items.summary: Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Cory Decarbonisation Project Order 2025.
